shortcuts: Nirlauncher - Run over 200 freeware utilities from nirsoft.net

main/WhoIsConnectedSniffer - Shows who connects to your network by listening to network packets
main/WhoisThisDomain - Get information about a registered domain from WHOIS server
main/WifiChannelMonitor - Captures wifi traffic in monitor mode and displays AP,clients information
main/WifiHistoryView - Displays the history of connections to wireless networks on your computer
main/WifiInfoView - Displays extensive information about wireless networks in your area
main/WinCrashReport - Displays a report about crashed Windows application
main/WinFontsView - Display sample of all fonts installed on your system
main/WinLister - This utility displays the list of opened windows on your system
main/WinLogOnView - Displays logon,logoff times on Windows Vista,7,8,2008
main/WinPrefetchView - View the Prefetch files (.pf) stored in your system
main/WinsockServicesView - View,Disable,Enable Winsock service providers installed on your system
main/Windows Updates History Viewer - Displays the history of Windows updates for your system
main/WirelessConnectionInfo - Displays general information and statistics about the active wifi connection
main/WirelessKeyView - Recovers lost wireless network keys (WEP,WPA) stored in your computer
main/WirelessNetView - Monitor the activity of wireless networks around you
main/Wireless Network Watcher - Shows who is connected to your wireless network
